personality_one_liner: A tactical, OLED-friendly operational command center built for speed, illuminated by controlled neon accents that evoke high-end RGB gaming rigs.

spacing.rule: Use strict grid spacing. Keep layouts dense but readable for fast operation. Sticky primary CTAs at bottom with safe-area clearance.

do's: Use solid surfaceSecondary and surfaceTertiary to maintain tactical clarity.
dont's: No blur or glass effects. Utility dashboards need maximum contrast and performance, especially with live timers.

screens.name: Home (Station Grid)
screens.purpose: Live operational view of all gaming stations (Available, Occupied, Maintenance) with running timers.

states.loading: Centered neon lime spinner on deep carbon background.
states.empty: Phosphor Desktop icon with 'No stations configured' and 'Add Station' CTA.
states.error: Error text in Neon Pink with 'Retry' CTA.

screens.layout: Sticky top header with total revenue metric. Horizontal-scroll chip row for filtering (All, PC, Console, Table) directly below header. 2-column grid of Station Cards. Cards use top border colored by status (Success=Available, Error=Occupied, Warning=Maintenance). Active cards show large Rajdhani live timer.

screens.name: Session Detail
screens.purpose: Manage an active session, add F&B items, and finalize the bill.

states.empty: Not applicable (only opens on specific station tap).

screens.layout: Bottom sheet or modal. Large monospace timer at the top. Customer CRM inputs (Name, Phone). List of added F&B items. Sticky primary CTA 'End Session & Generate Bill' anchored at bottom.

screens.name: F&B POS (Standalone)
screens.purpose: Quick billing for walk-in food and beverage customers.

states.empty: Hamburger icon with 'Menu is empty' message.

screens.layout: 2-column grid for food items with high-contrast imagery and price tags. Persistent floating cart summary sticky above bottom tabs. Tap item to increment counter.

screens.name: Manager Dashboard
screens.purpose: Secure analytics view for daily and monthly revenue broken down by Time vs F&B.

states.empty: Chart icon with 'No data available for this period'.

screens.layout: PIN Pad overlay (numeric grid, secure entry). Once unlocked: Stacked metric cards and interactive bar/line charts. Filters for Daily/Monthly at the top.

screens.name: Bill Summary
screens.purpose: Itemized bill view after ending a session or standalone POS order.
screens.layout: Receipt-style layout on surfaceSecondary. Monospace itemized list (Time cost + Add-ons + Total). Sticky bottom row with 'Share via WhatsApp' and 'Close' buttons.

hero_gaming_lounge.alt: Modern PC gaming lounge with neon RGB lighting in a dark room

food_item_placeholder.alt: Burger with dark background for POS menu

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility DARK guidelines. Use solid dark colors (#0F0F11 base) and rely on neon accents (#CCFF00, #FF2A55, #00FF66) strictly for states, primary buttons, and live metrics.
No glassmorphism. Dashboards require maximum contrast, especially with live timers running on the screen.
Typography: Use Rajdhani for all large metrics, timers, and headers to emphasize the gaming/esports operational vibe. Use IBM Plex Sans for tables, forms, and general UI readability.
Implement the PIN pad layout securely for the Manager Dashboard view.

Ensure Station Cards clearly differentiate between Available, Occupied, and Maintenance using the success, error, and warning tokens as a top border or side accent. Do not fill the entire card with the status color.
Always maintain a sticky CTA at the bottom of scrollable views like the Session Detail and F&B POS screens, leaving enough safe-area padding below.
